series_metadata.series_description: Documents that indicate if additional interest on the Treasurer''s investments is due to the Treasurer from the relevant bank. Additional interest is often due when a bank is late in wiring money to the Treasurer upon the maturity of a CD purchased through a linked deposit program. This report is comprised of a Linked Deposit Amortization Form, Compensation Due Report, emails, and other supporting documentation.

retention_rules.disposition: Paper: Retain until conclusion of current fiscal year, and for an additional 4 fiscal years., Paper: Shred
